iteration1.description: Baseline with original verbose SKILL.md (identical to skills/weather/SKILL.md)
iteration1.notes: weather-compare lost 10 points on weather-metrics: missing conditions keywords (sunny/cloudy/etc) and pipe-table format

iteration2.description: Optimized SKILL.md: added JSON format guidance (j1), explicit pipe-table template with Conditions column, emphasized weatherDesc field
iteration2.notes: All criteria at 1.0 for both tasks

changes: Restructured skill to emphasize JSON output format (j1) for structured data extraction
Added explicit markdown pipe-table template with Conditions column
Listed key JSON fields (temp_C, humidity, windspeedKmph, weatherDesc) for reliable extraction
Added travel comparison section with explicit temperature difference phrasing guidance
Removed verbose sections (when to use/not use, PNG format, airport codes) to reduce token count
